name: GitHub, CI Status
description: Full-bleed CI status banner across one or more watched repos. Renders ALL GREEN, N FAILING, or N RUNNING as the hero, with the failing repos called out by name. Useful as a big-mode complement to GitHub Actions: this is the at-a-glance answer to 'is anything red right now'. Public repos work without a token.

cell_options.name: repos
cell_options.label: Repos to watch (owner/repo, one per line)
